text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 
5 
EPRSCRB_SRVC_CD 
LABEL: 
Code Indicating the E-Prescribing Services Offered 
DESCRIPTION: For pharmacies that indicated they offer e-prescribing (reference variable called EPRSCRB_SRVC_IND), 
this variable identifies the type of e-prescribing transactions offered. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: EPRSCRB_SRVC_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
NCDPD DataQ™ 
VALUES: 
01 = Site does not accept
